spec_match.rationale: The actual grid cards now use height: calc(var(--item-h) - var(--gap-size)), and card number opacity consumes typed length division via 100cqw / var(--col-min-w).

interactive.rationale: The sliders update typed CSS custom properties and the browser-computed card height and opacity readouts change with the rendered grid.

blurb_alignment.rationale: The lede and explainer now focus on the real CSS declarations exercised by the demo instead of claiming a simulated column-count calculation.

edge_cases.rationale: The demo feature-detects typed arithmetic support and leaves fallback declarations for height and opacity when typed division is unsupported.

references.rationale: The page includes the mandatory ChromeStatus link and the CSS Values and Units Level 4 type-checking reference.

design_system.rationale: The page uses shared design tokens for status, code output, and syntax highlighting with no raw color literals.

summary: The grid layout concept now exercises CSS typed arithmetic in rendered styles rather than only printing JavaScript-calculated values, and its references and design-system issues are resolved.
